meaning: n.閲戞槦鐜荤拑 宓屾湁榛勯摐绮夌殑鑼惰壊鐜荤拑
examples: Goldstone wished Tom Hill were there to add heft to his argument.
Goldstone flipped through the pages and stabbed his thumb at the paragraph he was looking for.
Goldstone said if he knew then what he knows now, the report would have looked much different.
Fact Finding Mission on the Gaza Conflict, headed by Richard Goldstone, a South African judge.
Indeed, J Street's co-founder Daniel Levy accompanied Goldstone to his meetings on Capitol Hill.
